india_trends.title: India begins wheat exports after four-year hiatus on bumper crop
india_trends.summary: India has resumed wheat exports for the first time in four years, with ITC loading 22,000 metric tons for the UAE. A record harvest and higher global prices and freight rates are making Indian wheat competitive. This follows a ban imposed due to crop damage from extreme heat in previous years.

india_trends.title: US Stock Market | Oil shock risk builds beneath AI-driven market euphoria
india_trends.summary: Global equities are rallying on AI-driven optimism, with the S&P 500 hitting record highs amid strong earnings and stable economic conditions. However, a looming risk is emerging from the physical oil market, which is signalling potential disruption not yet priced into financial assets.
